evidence_summary: TL1A synergizes with IL-12 (and IL-18) to enhance IFN-gamma production in T/NK/MAIT cells, but TL1A does not directly induce IL-12 expression — they are co-acting partners on shared targets.
citations: TL1A Synergizes with IL-12 and IL-18 to Enhance IFN-gamma Production in Human T Cells and NK Cells — https://journals.aai.org/jimmunol/article/172/11/7002/80995/
TCR and Inflammatory Signals Tune Human MAIT Cells — https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S2211124719310988
search_queries_used: TL1A induces IL-12 production MAIT cells
TNFSF15 TL1A IL-12 upregulation

evidence_summary: Documented direction is reverse: IL-17C induces VEGF (via STAT3/miR-23a-3p) in colorectal cancer and IL-17 family drives angiogenesis. No published evidence of VEGF inducing IL-17C in immune cells.
citations: miR-23a-3p is a Key Regulator of IL-17C-Induced Tumor Angiogenesis — https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC7348989/
IL-17 Promotes Angiogenic Factors IL-6, IL-8, and VEGF Production — https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5098156/
search_queries_used: VEGF induces IL-17C expression

evidence_summary: APRIL is known for B-cell biology (IgA class switching, Bregs) and modest T-cell costimulation, but no published literature links APRIL to IL-26 induction in CD8 T cells.
search_queries_used: APRIL TNFSF13 induces IL-26 CD8 T cells
APRIL BAFF IL-26 induction T cell

evidence_summary: IL-36α (50 ng/ml) significantly increases endothelial tube formation in a VEGF-dependent manner; IL-36 family upregulates VEGFs and VEGFR2/3 in monocyte-rich inflammatory milieus (psoriasis).
citations: IL-36γ Is a Strong Inducer of IL-23 in Psoriatic Cells and Activates Angiogenesis — https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC5834930/
IL-36γ Augments Ocular Angiogenesis by Promoting the VEGF–VEGFR Axis — https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC10616713/
IL-1 Family Cytokine Regulation of Vascular Permeability and Angiogenesis — https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/immunology/articles/10.3389/fimmu.2019.01426/full
search_queries_used: IL-36 alpha induces VEGF monocyte angiogenesis
"IL-36 alpha" OR "IL-36α" VEGF angiogenesis induction
"IL-36α" OR "IL36A" monocyte VEGF inflammation

evidence_summary: IL-4 (not APRIL) induces IL-24 in macrophages and IL-4 also induces APRIL — they are downstream of a common signal but no direct APRIL→IL-24 induction is documented.
search_queries_used: APRIL induces IL-24 monocyte macrophage

evidence_summary: APRIL is a TNF superfamily member like CD30L, but no published link between APRIL signaling and CD30L (TNFSF8) upregulation in naive CD4 T cells.
search_queries_used: APRIL induces CD30 ligand TNFSF8 T cells

evidence_summary: Both APRIL and IL-36α are involved in inflammation but no published evidence that APRIL induces IL-36α expression in CD4 T cells.
search_queries_used: APRIL induces IL-36 alpha expression T cell

evidence_summary: FasL engagement induces DC maturation, IL-1β release, and IFN-γ, but no published evidence specifically linking FasL stimulation to IL-27 induction in conventional dendritic cells.
search_queries_used: FasL CD95L induces IL-27 dendritic cells

evidence_summary: IL-12 and IL-27 are sister IL-12 family cytokines co-regulated by TLR signaling in DCs; both act on CD8 T cells (CD39 induction, effector differentiation) but IL-12 does not directly induce IL-27 expression.
citations: IL-12 and IL-27 Promote CD39 Expression on CD8+ T Cells — https://journals.aai.org/jimmunol/article/210/10/1598/263576/
Regulation of Antitumor Immune Responses by the IL-12 Family — https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2946577/
search_queries_used: IL-12 induces IL-27 CD8 T cells
"IL-12" induces "IL-27" production expression

evidence_summary: Noggin is a BMP antagonist, not a classical immune cytokine. IL-27 modulates monocyte differentiation but no link to Noggin induction is documented.
search_queries_used: IL-27 induces Noggin BMP antagonist monocyte

evidence_summary: Noggin is a BMP antagonist that opposes VEGF-driven vasculogenesis; it is not a classical immune cytokine. No published link between VEGF and Noggin induction in NK cells.
citations: In vitro and In vivo imaging of antivasculogenesis induced by Noggin in human venous endothelial cells — https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/19692649/
search_queries_used: VEGF induces Noggin expression NK cells

evidence_summary: APRIL induces IL-10/PD-L1 in IgA+ Bregs and modulates Th2 responses indirectly, but no published evidence that APRIL directly induces IL-13 in naive CD4 T cells.
search_queries_used: APRIL induces IL-13 T helper 2 cells
APRIL TACI signaling cytokine cascade naive CD4

evidence_summary: Documented effect is OPPOSITE direction: IL-27 suppresses GATA3 and IL-4/Th2 responses rather than inducing IL-4 in NKT cells. The cytokines are antagonistically linked.
citations: IL-27: Its Roles in the Induction and Inhibition of Inflammation — https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC2480558/
IL-27 Limits Type 2 Immunopathology Following Parainfluenza Virus Infection — https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC5305264/
search_queries_used: IL-27 induces IL-4 NKT cells Th2

evidence_summary: Documented direction is reverse: EGF induces VEGF (and NRP-1) in cancer cells. No published evidence VEGF induces EGF in NK cells.
citations: Induction of neuropilin-1 and VEGF by EGF in human gastric cancer cells — https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2376351/
search_queries_used: VEGF induces EGF NK cells

evidence_summary: CD27/CD70 costimulation drives Th1 polarization and broad cytokine responses, but no published evidence that CD27L (CD70) induces IL-27 expression in monocytes.
search_queries_used: CD70 CD27L induces IL-27 monocyte expression

evidence_summary: GM-CSF promotes Th17 cell survival and IL-17 production in autoimmunity (via IL-6/IL-23-dependent pathway in DCs), but the canonical direction is Th17→GM-CSF; the relationship is bidirectional in autoimmune feedback loops.
citations: GM-CSF mediates autoimmunity by enhancing IL-6–dependent Th17 cell development — https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC2556786/
The encephalitogenicity of TH17 cells is dependent on IL-1- and IL-23-induced production of GM-CSF — https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC3116521/
search_queries_used: GM-CSF induces IL-17A NKT Th17
"GM-CSF" induces IL-17 production directly

evidence_summary: CD70-CD27 costimulation broadens naive CD4 cytokine repertoire (Th1, Th2, IL-2, TNF-α) but no published evidence linking CD27L to IL-9 induction specifically.
search_queries_used: CD70 CD27L induces IL-9 CD4 T cells

evidence_summary: IL-12 and IL-6 cooperate in T cell priming/Th1 development but no published evidence that IL-12 induces IL-6 production in NKT cells.
search_queries_used: IL-12 induces IL-6 NKT cells expression

evidence_summary: Both TL1A and APRIL are TNF superfamily members but no published link between TL1A signaling and APRIL induction in MAIT cells or elsewhere.

citations: Transcription Factors Associated With IL-15 Cytokine Signaling During NK Cell Development — https://www.frontiersin.org/journals/immunology/articles/10.3389/fimmu.2021.610789/full
